---
title: "Top-N Research Paper Recommender System"
subtitle: "Exploring different techniques to build a ranking recommender system for paper-author implicit dataset"
author: "Ebrahim Alhaddad"
date: "Dec 15, 2025"
image: recommend.png
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false

---

## Deck
{{< pdf recommend.pdf width=100% height=450 >}}

## Github
[View repository on GitHub](https://github.com/ebrahimAlhaddad/recommender-system)
